rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
Use assign statements in implementation scopes only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or property references not present in the model.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Align helper declaration types with the expression types (bool, int, real).
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions and guarantees; implementation annexes for bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE clauses.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about package or property set visibility
Model fusion or owner/scope preservation rules
